questions.q: Following their newly secured majority, the federal Liberals are moving to change standing orders to take control of what?
Which US tech company faced backlash in April 2026 from UK lawmakers who called its recently published 22-point manifesto the "ramblings of a supervillain"?
Following the Ontario private jet controversy, a CBC News inquiry found that the majority of Canada's provincial premiers rely primarily on what for official business travel?
The Ontario government recently purchased, and then planned to sell, a $28.9 million private jet that reportedly could only use what percentage of the province's recognized airports?
A US appeals court ruled in April 2026 that which state can require public schools to display the Ten Commandments in classrooms?
Voters in which state approved a mid-decade congressional redistricting plan in April 2026 that is projected to give Democrats a significant midterm election boost?
Which Canadian territory announced it will follow Alberta's lead in ditching twice-a-year clock changes to adopt permanent daylight time?
According to sources, what is the Trump administration demanding from Canada before beginning formal trade talks for a revised CUSMA?
options: The resignation of the trade minister

questions.q: In April 2026, a federal investigation was launched following the deaths and disappearances of at least 10 US professionals in which field?
Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced in April 2026 that US military members will no longer be required to receive which annual vaccination?
